metadata.description: EnterpriseCrew — a thin, evidence-gated Claude Code harness. Ceremony has to earn its keep.

plugins.name: enterprise-crew
plugins.description: A thin Claude Code harness where ceremony has to earn its keep: independent review (Data), read-only recon (away-team), impact-mapped tests (Geordi), risk-gated planning, and a Stop-hook that enforces review on non-trivial changes.
